zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel de Camville於大約1152年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾斯坦頓 哈爾庫特時，她的父親Richard Lilbourne Stanton De Camville38歲，母親Melisende de Rethel35歲。她於大約1174年與Robert de Harcourt結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1208年之後在英國奧可福爾斯坦頓 聖 約翰。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel de Camville于大约1152年出生在英国英格兰奧可福爾斯坦頓 哈爾庫特时，她的父亲Richard Lilbourne Stanton De Camville38岁，母亲Melisende de Rethel35岁。她于大约1174年与Robert de Harcourt结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1208年之后在英国奧可福爾斯坦頓 聖 約翰。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Camville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French; English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from any of the places in Calvados and Seine-Maritime named Carville, from the Scandinavian personal name Kári + Old French ville ‘settlement’.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Ó Cearbhaill or Mac Cearbhaill, see Carroll .

variants.name: Carroll
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Ó Cearbhaill or Mac Cearbhaill ‘descendant (or son) of Cearbhall’, a personal name perhaps based on cearbh ‘hacking’ and hence originally a byname for a butcher or a fierce warrior.
English and Scottish: variant of   Carrell  .

variants.name: Garfield
meanings: English (Midlands): topographic name from Middle English gor(e), gar(e) ‘triangular piece’ + feld ‘open country, field’ (Old English gār + feld), for someone who lived by a triangular piece of land.
English: alternatively, sometimes perhaps a variant of Carville (a name of Norman origin), with excrescent final -d.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel de Camville was born about 1152, in Stanton Harcourt, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard Lilbourne Stanton De Camville, was 38 and her mother, Melisende de Rethel, was 35. She married Robert de Harcourt about 1174. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died after 1208, in Stanton St John, Oxfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel de Camville est née environ 1152, à Stanton Harcourt, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Lilbourne Stanton De Camville, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Melisende de Rethel, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Harcourt environ 1174. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 1208, à Stanton St John, Oxfordshire, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel de Camvilleが約1152年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアスタントン ハーコウルトで生まれた時，父Richard Lilbourne Stanton De Camvilleは38歳，母Melisende de Rethelは35歳であった。約1174年にRobert de Harcourtと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1208年以後にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアスタントン スト ジョンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel de Camville(이)가 대략 1152년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 스탠턴 하르쿠르트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Lilbourne Stanton De Camville(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Melisende de Rethel(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 대략 1174년 Robert de Harcourt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1208년 이후 영국 스퍼드실르 스탠턴 스트 존에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel de Camville родилась около 1152 г. в местности стантон харкоурт, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard Lilbourne Stanton De Camville было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Melisende de Rethel, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Harcourt около 1174 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 1208 г. в местности стантон ст джон, оксфордшир, Англия.
